name: Go SRT Shell Case
summary: The Go SRT Shell Case is a storage and transport solution for glass capsules used with the Arizer Go SRT.
description: The Go SRT Shell Case is a storage and transport solution for glass capsules used with the Arizer Go SRT. Designed for compatibility with Go chambers and chamber sets, it keeps accessories protected and ready for use. With capacity for up to seven chambers, this case is ideal for organised storage, pre-filled inventory management, and efficient handling in retail or service environments. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
